## Summary

## Changes

- [ ] Code changes
- [ ] Tests added / updated
- [ ] CLAUDE.md updated (per `~/.claude/rules/claude-md-freshness.md`)

## Verification

<!-- Marcar al menos uno -->
- [ ] Tests passing locally
- [ ] Build compiles
- [ ] Manual smoke test
- [ ] Screenshot attached (UI changes)

## Quality checklist

- [ ] No legacy / dead / duplicate code (per `~/.claude/rules/no-legacy-rule.md`)
- [ ] Files <800 lines, functions <50 lines
- [ ] Errors handled explicitly
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets
- [ ] 80%+ test coverage on new code
